description: A refinery operator needs to blend several components to produce a batch of on-spec unleaded gasoline.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the recipe for '87 Octane Gasoline' from the blending system.

expected_outcome.value: The blend recipe with component percentages is retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Initiate the blend operation, controlling the flow rates of the different components (e.g., reformate, alkylate, ethanol) into the blending tank.

expected_outcome.value: The blending process is started and monitored in real-time.

nodes.task_description: After blending, take a sample and send it to the lab to certify that the final product meets all quality specifications (e.g., octane, RVP).

expected_outcome.value: The final product is tested and certified as on-spec.
